basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi has released the official notification for Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M. S degree in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Tech./M. S degree in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 37000 p.m. plus HRA as applicable
salary_details.details: Rs 37000 p.m. plus HRA as applicable

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 19th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech. or M.S. degree in Mechanical or Aerospace Engineering to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs 37,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as applicable.

faq.question: Q4. How should I apply for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your detailed Curriculum Vitae (CV) to the Principal Investigator, Dr. Rajeev Kumar, at [email protected].

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the project title for which the Junior Research Fellow is being recruited?
faq.answer: The project is titled 'Design, analysis and development of photostrictive composite actuator'.

faq.question: Q7. What details should be included in the Curriculum Vitae (CV)?
faq.answer: Your CV should include personal details, academic qualifications (with marks/division), publications, work experience, and contact information for two referees.

faq.question: Q8. What should be mentioned in the subject line of the application email?
faq.answer: The subject line of your email must clearly mention the Advertisement Number: IITM/SRIC/Project No. DRDO-AR&DB/RK/550/2025.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 175005.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or project-based position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based position, indicating it is temporary and tied to the duration of the specific research project.
